# Rule30 VDF — Verifiable Delay Function

> Rule 30 based Verifiable Delay Function implementation.
> Cryptographic research by Igor Holt.

## Technology
- Cellular automata based VDF
- Rule 30 implementation
- Cryptographic verification

## Genesis Conductor Integration
- Used for temporal verification
- Part of thermodynamic computing stack
